claim_1: Moderate coffee consumption is associated with a lower risk of heart disease.
claim_2: Coffee consumption increases the risk of heart disease even in moderate amounts.

claim_1: Red stop signs are easier for drivers to see than yellow ones.
claim_2: Red stop signs are more visible to drivers than yellow stop signs.

claim_1: A standard stop sign has an octagonal shape.
claim_2: Stop signs instruct drivers to come to a complete stop at intersections.

claim_1: Very high intake of coffee may increase blood pressure.
claim_2: Moderate coffee consumption is associated with a lower risk of heart disease.
